user.title: TimeWinder Operations Hub
user.description: Sign in with your CrewNet email. You'll receive a 6-digit code by SMS in the next step. The account needs the Drift Coordinator role to see command-center and analytics data.

otp.title: Enter SMS code
otp.description: Enter the 6-digit code sent to the phone for {email}.

reauth_confirm.title: Renew sign-in
reauth_confirm.description: Your token expired. We sent a new SMS code for {email}. Enter it to renew access.

error.request_failed: Could not send a code. Check the email and that the account exists in CrewNet.
